channel.title: Cannot Deploy to Vercel
channel.description:
Hi!
Having trouble deploying to Vercel.
Here's the log: ![Screen Shot 2023-10-30 at 11.54.03 AM|687x500](upload://pqTz1LYXyhRR7rPHoN2VsdH41iI.png)
Here's my `package.json`: ``` { "name": "oddboll", "version": "1.0.0", "private": true, "description": "Frontity project", "keywords": [ "frontity" ], "engines": { "node": ">=10.0.0", "npm": ">=6.0.0" }, "scripts": { "dev": "frontity dev", "build": "frontity build", "serve": "frontity serve" }, "prettier": {}, "dependencies": { "@frontity/core": "^1.16.0", "@frontity/html2react": "^1.7.0", "@frontity/mars-theme": "./packages/mars-theme", "@frontity/tiny-router": "^1.4.4", "@frontity/wp-source": "^1.11.7", "dayjs": "^1.11.9", "frontity": "^1.17.2", "oddboll": "file:packages/oddboll" } } ``` I tried [this solution](https://community.frontity.org/t/can-not-deploy-on-vercel/6679) but it did not help. I also tried changing node version to `16.x` both inside `package.json` and in Vercel settings but that gave me `Error: Found "engines" in "package.json" with an invalid Node.js version range: "16.x". Please set "engines": { "node": "12.x" } in your "package.json" file to upgrade to Node.js 12.`

item.title: Cannot Deploy to Vercel
item.dc:creator: francis
item.description:
Just commenting that this works but not ideal.

Read full topic

item.title: Cannot Deploy to Vercel
item.dc:creator: maniutin
item.description:
ended up changing the build inside package.json to "NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider frontity build" and it worked.

Read full topic

item.title: Cannot Deploy to Vercel
item.dc:creator: maniutin
item.description:
UPD: tried using Heroku and deployment fails with the same error.

Read full topic

item.title: Cannot Deploy to Vercel
item.dc:creator: maniutin
item.description:
Hi!

Having trouble deploying to Vercel.

Here’s the log:

Here’s my package.json:

{
  "name": "oddboll",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "private": true,
  "description": "Frontity project",
  "keywords": [
    "frontity"
  ],
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=10.0.0",
    "npm": ">=6.0.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "frontity dev",
    "build": "frontity build",
    "serve": "frontity serve"
  },
  "prettier": {},
  "dependencies": {
    "@frontity/core": "^1.16.0",
    "@frontity/html2react": "^1.7.0",
    "@frontity/mars-theme": "./packages/mars-theme",
    "@frontity/tiny-router": "^1.4.4",
    "@frontity/wp-source": "^1.11.7",
    "dayjs": "^1.11.9",
    "frontity": "^1.17.2",
    "oddboll": "file:packages/oddboll"
  }
}

I tried this solution but it did not help. I also tried changing node version to 16.x both inside package.json and in Vercel settings but that gave me Error: Found "engines" in "package.json" with an invalid Node.js version range: "16.x". Please set "engines": { "node": "12.x" } in your "package.json" file to upgrade to Node.js 12.

Read full topic
